title: Pan-Seared Paprika-Spiced Slovakian Bacon Lardon Wrap
description: A flavorful Slovakian dish featuring crispy bacon lardons and melted cheese wrapped in a spicy ssam-wrap, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the paprika-spiced mixture to the bacon lardons and toss to coat.
Heat a tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium heat and cook the bacon lardons until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the cooked bacon to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess grease.
Melt a tablespoon of butter in the skillet and add the ssam-wrap, cooking for 1-2 minutes on each side, until slightly puffed and crispy.
Assemble the wrap by placing the cooked bacon lardons on one half of the ssam-wrap, followed by sliced cheese and a sprinkle of chopped fresh parsley.
Fold the other half of the ssam-wrap over the filling and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the wrap is crispy.
